summary: I ran the test-critic step for the Define phase of the "Add UI for Dashboard" task. I inspected the phase's inputs and the branch's own commit history and confirmed that every step in this Define phase (requirements-writer, clarifying-questions-writer, codebase-explorer, guide-alignment-critic) wrote **only** Markdown documentation under `.pipeliner/` — there is no implementation, build, or new test produced by this phase (the app/lib/worker/db code in the `main..HEAD` diff is pre-existing base-branch work, not this phase's output). Because there is nothing runnable to build or test — and because running the existing suite would only exercise unrelated pre-existing code against the live orchestrating system's shared environment, which the safety rule warns against for no benefit — I wrote a `not_applicable` verdict with an empty findings list to `.pipeliner/phases/01-define/main/test-critic/verdict.json`.
